Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Requiring Pltf To Furnish Security Ccp 391.1; P/A; Request For Judicial Notice, Declaration ) Ccp 128.7
Off Calendar Aug-07-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Paul Arshawsky of Zanghi Torres Arshawsky (977.0444) for defendants and moving parties

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY AND BRENDA HUTCHERSON'S MOTION FOR ORDER REQUIRING PLAINTIFF TO FURNISH SECURITY CCP 391.1 is granted. The Court has reviewed the complaint and the moving papers submitted by defendant pursuant to Moran v. Murtaugh Miller Meyer & Nelson, LLP (2007) 40 Cal. 4th 780. The Court finds that plaintiff has no probability of success in this action is required to post a bond of $500.00. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM/AY) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Trish Abalos.
Plaintiff: Janet Pickens, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Defaults entered on Oct. 3, 2007 against Defendant: Brenda Hutchnson and Co-Defendant: John Stwerar Company were ordered to set aside on Oct. 31, 2007, by Dept. 302, Judge Mahoney.
Matter is ordered off calendar.
